004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
035
036/**
037 * Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with {@link Header} on {@link RestOp}-annotated Java methods.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * This includes any of the following predefined request header types:
041 *
042 * <ul class='javatree condensed'>
043 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Accept}
044 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AcceptCharset}
045 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AcceptEncoding}
046 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AcceptLanguage}
047 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AcceptRanges}
048 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Authorization}
049 *    <li class='jc'>{@link CacheControl}
050 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ClientVersion}
051 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Connection}
052 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ContentDisposition}
053 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ContentEncoding}
054 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ContentLength}
055 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ContentType}
056 *    <li class='jc'>{@link org.apache.juneau.http.header.Date}
057 *    <li class='jc'>{@link org.apache.juneau.http.header.Debug}
058 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Expect}
059 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Forwarded}
060 *    <li class='jc'>{@link From}
061 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Host}
062 *    <li class='jc'>{@link IfMatch}
063 *    <li class='jc'>{@link IfModifiedSince}
064 *    <li class='jc'>{@link IfNoneMatch}
065 *    <li class='jc'>{@link IfRange}
066 *    <li class='jc'>{@link IfUnmodifiedSince}
067 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MaxForwards}
068 *    <li class='jc'>{@link NoTrace}
069 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Origin}
070 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Pragma}
071 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ProxyAuthorization}
072 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Range}
073 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Referer}
074 *    <li class='jc'>{@link TE}
075 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Thrown}
076 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Upgrade}
077 *    <li class='jc'>{@link UserAgent}
078 *    <li class='jc'>{@link Warning}
079 * </ul>
080 *
081 * <p>
082 * The parameter value is resolved using:
083 * <p class='bjava'>
084 *    <jv>opSession</jv>
085 *       .{@link RestOpSession#getRequest() getRequest}()
086 *       .{@link RestRequest#getHeaders() getHeaders}();
087 * </p>
088 *
089 * <p>
090 * {@link HttpPartSchema schema} is derived from the {@link Header} annotation.
091 *
092 * <p>
093 * If the {@link Schema#collectionFormat()} value is {@link HttpPartCollectionFormat#MULTI}, then the data type can be a {@link Collection} or array.
094 *
095 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
096 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JavaMethodParameters">Java Method Parameters</a>
097 * </ul>
098 */
099public class HeaderArg implements RestOpArg {
100
101   private static final AnnotationProvider AP = AnnotationProvider.INSTANCE;
102
103   /**
104    * Static creator.
105    *
106    * @param paramInfo The Java method parameter being resolved.
107    * @param annotations The annotations to apply to any new part parsers.
108    * @return A new {@link HeaderArg}, or <jk>null</jk> if the parameter is not annotated with {@link Header}.
109    */
110   public static HeaderArg create(ParameterInfo paramInfo, AnnotationWorkList annotations) {
111      if (paramInfo.getParameterType().is(Holder.class))
112         return null;
113      if (AP.has(Header.class, paramInfo) || nameFromTypeNameField(paramInfo) != null)
114         return new HeaderArg(paramInfo, annotations);
115      return null;
116   }
117
118   private static Optional<String> findName(ParameterInfo pi) {
119      // @formatter:off
120      var fromAnnotation = AP.find(Header.class, pi)
121         .stream()
122         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
123         .filter(x -> isAnyNotBlank(x.value(), x.name()))
124         .findFirst()
125         .map(x -> firstNonBlank(x.name(), x.value()));
126      // @formatter:on
127      if (fromAnnotation.isPresent())
128         return fromAnnotation;
129      return o(nameFromTypeNameField(pi));
130   }
131
132   private static String nameFromTypeNameField(ParameterInfo pi) {
133      try {
134         var c = pi.getParameterType().inner();
135         if (c == null)
136            return null;
137         var f = c.getField("NAME");
138         if (java.lang.reflect.Modifier.isStatic(f.getModifiers()) && f.getType() == String.class) {
139            var v = f.get(null);
140            return v == null ? null : v.toString();
141         }
142      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException ignored) {
143         // Type has no NAME field; not a recognized typed-header bean.
144      }
145      return null;
146   }
147
148   private static Optional<String> findDef(ParameterInfo pi) {
149      // @formatter:off
150      return AP.find(Header.class, pi)
151         .stream()
152         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
153         .filter(x -> ine(x.def()))
154         .findFirst()
155         .map(Header::def);
156      // @formatter:on
157   }
158
159   private static Header getClassLevelHeader(ParameterInfo pi, String paramName) {
160      var declaringClass = pi.getMethod().getDeclaringClass();
161      if (declaringClass == null)
162         return null;
163      var restAnnotation = declaringClass.getAnnotations(Rest.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
164      if (restAnnotation == null)
165         return null;
166      for (var h : restAnnotation.headerParams()) {
167         var hName = firstNonEmpty(h.name(), h.value());
168         if (paramName.equals(hName))
169            return h;
170      }
171      return null;
172   }
173
174   private final HttpPartParser partParser;
175   private final HttpPartSchema schema;
176   private final boolean multi;
177   private final String name;
178   private final String def;
179   private final ClassInfo type;
180
181   /**
182    * Constructor.
183    *
184    * @param pi The Java method parameter being resolved.
185    * @param annotations The annotations to apply to any new part parsers.
186    */
187   protected HeaderArg(ParameterInfo pi, AnnotationWorkList annotations) {
188      this.name = findName(pi).orElseThrow(() -> new ArgException(pi, "@Header used without name or value"));
189
190      var classLevelHeader = getClassLevelHeader(pi, name);
191
192      var schemaBuilder = HttpPartSchema.create();
193      if (classLevelHeader != null)
194         schemaBuilder.apply(classLevelHeader);
195      schemaBuilder.applyAll(Header.class, pi);
196      this.schema = schemaBuilder.build();
197
198      this.def = findDef(pi).or(() -> o(classLevelHeader).filter(h -> ine(h.def())).map(Header::def)).orElse(null);
199      this.type = pi.getParameterType();
200      @SuppressWarnings({
201         "unchecked" // Type erasure on reflective/generic cast; element type is verified at call site
202      })
203      var pp = (Class<? extends HttpPartParser>)schema.getParser();
204      this.partParser = nn(pp) ? HttpPartParser.creator().type(pp).apply(annotations).create() : null;
205      this.multi = schema.getCollectionFormat() == HttpPartCollectionFormat.MULTI;
206
207      if (multi && ! type.isCollectionOrArray())
208         throw new ArgException(pi, "Use of multipart flag on @Header parameter that is not an array or Collection");
209   }
210
211   @SuppressWarnings({
212      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for REST argument resolution with generic types
213      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in REST argument parsing
214   })
215   @Override /* Overridden from RestOpArg */
216   public Object resolve(RestOpSession opSession) throws Exception {
217      var req = opSession.getRequest();
218      var ps = partParser == null ? req.getPartParserSession() : partParser.getPartSession();
219      var rh = req.getHeaders();
220      var bs = req.getMarshallingSession();
221      var cm = bs.getClassMeta(type.innerType());
222
223      if (multi) {
224         Collection c;
225         if (cm.isArray()) {
226            c = list();
227         } else if (cm.canCreateNewInstance()) {
228            c = (Collection)cm.newInstance();
229         } else {
230            c = new JsonList();
231         }
232         rh.stream(name).map(x -> x.parser(ps).schema(schema).as(cm.getElementType()).orElse(null)).forEach(c::add);
233         return cm.isArray() ? toArray(c, cm.getElementType().inner()) : c;
234      }
235
236      if (cm.isMapOrBean() && isOneOf(name, "*", "")) {
237         var m = new JsonMap();
238         rh.forEach(x -> m.put(x.getName(), x.parser(ps).schema(schema == null ? null : schema.getProperty(x.getName())).as(cm.getValueType()).orElse(null)));
239         return req.getMarshallingSession().convertToType(m, cm);
240      }
241
242      return rh.getLast(name).parser(ps).schema(schema).def(def).as(type.innerType()).orElse(null);
243   }
244}
